3267770.name: The Coma 2B: Catacomb Soundtrack
3267770.description: The soundtrack features original compositions by Hakyung Kim, a composer known for mastering The Coma style and crafting captivating melodies and grand game sounds. The game shifts from a modern horror setting to a more historical one, so Kim blends Korean and Japanese folkloric sounds to create dramatic and unique pieces. These tracks form strange yet haunting harmonies against the eerie game backdrop.
